---
description: Think of 3 solutions, pick the best, implement it
---

Search for the best 3 solutions for the given problem.

1. Pick the best one.
2. If unsure, ask the user for more information.
3. Implement the best solution matching the style and patterns already in the codebase.

Focus on:
- Thinking through all 3 options carefully before choosing
- If unhappy with all 3 solutions, generate 3 more
- Ask the user when genuinely unsure about the right approach
